delegatedBy.description:
You are the subagent **gsd-security-auditor** — verify threat mitigations for Phase 43 of the Hivemind project.

## Required Reading
1. `.opencode/agents/gsd-security-auditor.md` — your role instructions
2. `.planning/phases/43-tmux-co-pilot-model-orchestrator-intervention/43-01-PLAN.md`
3. `.planning/phases/43-tmux-co-pilot-model-orchestrator-intervention/43-02-PLAN.md`
4. `.planning/phases/43-tmux-co-pilot-model-orchestrator-intervention/43-01-SUMMARY.md`
5. `.planning/phases/43-tmux-co-pilot-model-orchestrator-intervention/43-02-SUMMARY.md`
6. `.opencode/get-shit-done/templates/SECURITY.md` — output template

## Threat Register (extracted from PLAN.md `<threat_model>` blocks)

```
register_authored_at_plan_time: true
total_threats: 9 (10 entries, T-43-SC appears in both PLAN files — treat as single consolidated threat)

T-43-01  [mitigate] Tampering          — sendKeys argv construction
         mitigation: P42 quoteShellArg wraps all argv; literal flag (-l) prevents tmux from
                     interpreting special keys; await only confirms acceptance not execution
         files_to_check: opencode-tmux/src/util.ts (quoteShellArg), opencode-tmux/src/tmux.ts (sendKeys)

T-43-02  [accept]   Information Disclosure — listPanes stdout
         mitigation: Pane titles may contain Hivemind agent names; this is intentional
                     (operator visibility) — no secrets in pane titles by design
         files_to_check: opencode-tmux/src/tmux.ts (listPanes)

T-43-03  [mitigate] Denial of Service  — PaneGridPlanner debounce
         mitigation: Trailing-edge coalescing; if a caller never releases, a shutdown
                     `cancel()` is available; max tree depth is caller-controlled
         files_to_check: opencode-tmux/src/grid-planner.ts

T-43-04  [mitigate] Spoofing           — respawnIfKnown meta propagation
         mitigation: hivemindMeta is read from the same-process KnownSession record
                     (not from network); no untrusted input crosses this boundary
         files_to_check: opencode-tmux/src/session-manager.ts (respawnIfKnown)

T-43-05  [mitigate] Elevation of Privilege — tmux-copilot tool
         mitigation: Permission gate `requiresPermission: ["orchestrator"]` enforced by
                     Hivemind's tool dispatch; non-orchestrator agents cannot invoke
         files_to_check: src/tools/tmux-copilot.ts

T-43-06  [accept]   Repudiation        — Tool result shape
         mitigation: Results are structured JSON with explicit `{error: {kind, ...}}`
                     discriminators; no silent failures; full trace via Hivemind observability
         files_to_check: src/tools/tmux-copilot.ts

T-43-07  [accept]   Information Disclosure — listPanes results
         mitigation: Pane titles may contain agent names (intentional operator visibility
                     per 43-01 T-43-02); no secrets cross this boundary by design
         files_to_check: src/tools/tmux-copilot.ts

T-43-08  [mitigate] Tampering          — fork-bridge singleton
         mitigation: Module-private state; replace-only semantics; no user input mutates
                     the adapter reference (only the bootstrap call does)
         files_to_check: src/tools/tmux-copilot.ts, src/plugin.ts (or wherever fork-bridge
                     is registered), opencode-tmux/src/index.ts

T-43-09  [mitigate] Denial of Service  — tmux-copilot tool
         mitigation: All adapter calls wrapped in try/catch; tool returns graceful
                     `{available: false}` rather than throwing; no infinite loops
         files_to_check: src/tools/tmux-copilot.ts

T-43-SC  [mitigate] Tampering          — dependency installs
         mitigation: No new packages (43-01 uses node:child_process, node:fs, node:path
                     built-ins; 43-02 uses existing Hivemind deps: zod, @opencode-ai/plugin,
                     vitest)
         files_to_check: package.json, opencode-tmux/package.json
```

## Config
- asvs_level: 2 (default for Hivemind)
- block_on: open (default — open threats block phase advancement)

## Constraints
- **Never modify implementation files.** You are READ-ONLY on src/, opencode-tmux/, package.json.
- **Only create/modify:** `.planning/phases/43-tmux-co-pilot-model-orchestrator-intervention/43-SECURITY.md`
- **Verify mitigations exist** — do not scan for new threats. The register is complete.
- Apply FORCE stance: assume every mitigation is absent until a grep match proves otherwise.
- For `accept` threats: verify entry present in SECURITY.md accepted risks log (currently empty — this is State B, no existing SECURITY.md, so all 3 accept threats will be OPEN unless you add them to SECURITY.md).
- For `transfer` threats: not applicable here.
- Implementation security gaps → OPEN_THREATS or ESCALATE.

## Output Path
- Write to: `.planning/phases/43-tmux-co-pilot-model-orchestrator-intervention/43-SECURITY.md`
- Use template: `.opencode/get-shit-done/templates/SECURITY.md`
- Fill all sections: Trust Boundaries, Threat Register (with Status), Accepted Risks Log (T-43-02, T-43-06, T-43-07), Security Audit Trail, Sign-Off

## Return Format
Return ONE of:
- `## SECURED` (if all 9 threats closed, threats_open: 0)
- `## OPEN_THREATS` (if any threats remain open, with detail)
- `## ESCALATE` (if blocked)

After return, the parent orchestrator will commit and route. Do NOT commit yourself. Do NOT run the next-phase routing.
